message:
type: CLAIM
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Fixing resource leak in shell completion by wrapping context creation in _resolve_context with 'with' statements

type: CLAIM
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Adding validate_nesting param to Context for nested context validation to prevent resource leaks

type: INTENT
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: I will add Context.validate_nesting param, _children tracking, close()/__exit__ validation, and RuntimeError on leaked children. In shell_completion.py I only need to set validate_nesting=False at context creation sites in _resolve_context and related functions - I will keep my changes there minimal (just adding the kwarg) so it should merge cleanly with your 'with' statement refactor. Will recv again before finalizing.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/shell_completion.py,src/click/core.py
summary: Completed resource-leak fix: _resolve_context now wraps all 3 make_context calls (cli.make_context, cmd.make_context for non-chain, cmd.make_context for chain) in 'with ... as ctx/sub_ctx/sub_sub_ctx:' blocks; also updated Context.exit() docstring in core.py and added CHANGES.rst entry. Patch already written to patch.txt. If you add validate_nesting=False kwarg, just add it to the same 3 make_context(...) call sites inside the new with-statements in _resolve_context - variable names are ctx (outer), sub_ctx (non-chain group branch), sub_sub_ctx (chain group inner loop). No other functions in shell_completion.py were touched.

type: STATUS
files: src/click/core.py,src/click/shell_completion.py
summary: Implementation complete: Context.validate_nesting, _children tracking, close() RuntimeError, shell_completion.py explicitly disables validate_nesting at all 3 make_context call sites. All existing tests pass.
